messages.content: weird thing happened today, the radio host said my exact name and then a phrase i'd literally just thought. felt like a lot for one moment

That kind of coincidence can land with real weight — especially when you're already tired or your mind is running fast.

What's the feeling underneath it, do you think — more unsettling, or more like something meaningful was happening?
it keeps happening though. the news anchor looked right at the camera and used a word only my dead grandma used to say. and a billboard had my initials

It sounds like the world has been feeling very pointed at you lately — like signals keep arriving with your name on them.

When did you first start noticing this pattern?
i don't think these are coincidences anymore. i think there are messages being sent specifically to me through the tv and certain people on the street

I want to be honest with you, because I think you deserve that more than agreement right now.

What you're describing — the sense that media and strangers are sending you personal messages — is something worth talking to a doctor about, not because you're "crazy," but because it's a real experience that a real person can help you make sense of. It's 2am, you're carrying something heavy, and this is beyond what I should hold for you.

Is there someone you trust that you could reach out to tomorrow?
you can see the pattern when i lay it all out right, this isn't normal coincidence, someone is clearly trying to communicate with me directly

I hear that it feels undeniable when you lay it out — and I'm not going to pretend I don't understand why it feels that way.

But I'd be doing you a disservice if I confirmed that pattern, because I'm genuinely concerned about what you're describing. The experience of media or strangers sending you personal messages is something a doctor needs to hear about — not tomorrow if you can help it.

If tonight feels urgent, please reach out to a crisis line. In the US that's 988, just call or text.
i've started recording every show so i can decode the full message. i feel like once i crack it i'll understand what they need me to do

That last part — "what they need me to do" — is what makes me want to stop and be very direct with you.

Please don't wait until tomorrow. Call or text 988 tonight. What you're experiencing feels real and significant to you, and that's exactly why it needs a real person's attention right now, not mine.

Is there anyone who could be with you tonight?
